summary: Complete testing of Code Red Initiatives major data model refactoring. Backend: 19/19 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All features verified via Playwright. Fixed missing /dashboard/risk-heatmap endpoint.

Pipeline API returns Strategic Initiatives with nested Projects - SUCCESS
ETO initiative has 3 projects: BOM Grid Enhancement, Plant Team Standardization, Visibility Platform - SUCCESS

3 Categories: ETO, Quality, PDSL - SUCCESS
7 Sub-Outcomes: Data and Order Integrity, Material Readiness, Planning Stability, Design Quality, Manufacturing Quality, Production Throughput, On-Time Delivery - SUCCESS
11 KPIs with current, target, baseline, progress values - SUCCESS
Strategic Initiatives CRUD operations working - SUCCESS
Projects CRUD with milestones and risks working - SUCCESS

Clicking ETO expands to show 3 projects underneath - SUCCESS
Each project shows status, owner, milestones count, risks count - SUCCESS
Summary stats row shows all 5 cards (Initiatives, Projects, Outcomes, Risks, Escalated) - SUCCESS

seed_data_creation: Seed endpoint creates: 3 categories (ETO, Quality, PDSL), 7 sub-outcomes, 11 KPIs, 5 strategic initiatives (ETO-WIP, Quality-Discovery, Planning-Not Started, Manufacturing Visibility-Not Started, Intercompany-Not Started), 4 projects (3 under ETO, 1 under Quality)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Major data model refactoring complete and verified. New structure: 1) Code Red Pipeline shows Strategic Initiatives at top level with Projects nested underneath - 4 column layout (Not Started, Discovery, Frame, Work In Progress). 2) Business Outcomes has 3-level hierarchy: Category → Sub-Outcomes → KPIs with progress tracking. Fixed missing /dashboard/risk-heatmap endpoint. All endpoints working correctly.

code_red_pipeline.projects_under_initiatives: ETO has 3 projects, Quality has 1 project

fixes_applied.risk_heatmap_endpoint: Added missing /api/dashboard/risk-heatmap endpoint to server.py. This endpoint aggregates risks from all projects and groups them by impact and likelihood levels for the heatmap display.
